title: What tune does Hikary hum
wikitext:
[]: What tune does Hikary hum?             Quote Post by azudem » Fri Feb 24, 2023 11:53 am During cooking in episodes 17 (21:35) and 18 (20:00) Hikari hums some tunes. What are these tunes? The tune from episode 18 resembles "Happy Birthday to you" (except two last notes). But maybe it's just a random coincidence, because the tune is short. If it's intentionally "Happy Birthday", this make sense, because we'll know after a while that Toji is alive. The tune from episode 17 is longer, but I can't recognize it. Note: I mean original Japanese dub.

[]: Re: What tune does Hikary hum?             Quote Post by Archer » Fri Feb 24, 2023 6:49 pm Fly me to the moon

[]: Re: What tune does Hikary hum?             Quote Post by azudem » Sat Feb 25, 2023 7:00 am Archer wrote: Fly me to the moon

Article: What tune does Hikary hum
[]: What tune does Hikary hum?             Quote Post by azudem » Fri Feb 24, 2023 11:53 am During cooking in episodes 17 (21:35) and 18 (20:00) Hikari hums some tunes. What are these tunes? The tune from episode 18 resembles "Happy Birthday to you" (except two last notes). But maybe it's just a random coincidence, because the tune is short. If it's intentionally "Happy Birthday", this make sense, because we'll know after a while that Toji is alive. The tune from episode 17 is longer, but I can't recognize it. Note: I mean original Japanese dub.
